   886	    async def chat_stream(
   887	        self,
   888	        session_id: uuid.UUID,
   889	        user_message: str,
   890	        db: AsyncSession,
   891	        user: Optional[User] = None,
   892	        locale: Optional[str] = None,
   893	        mode: Optional[str] = None,
   894	        domain_mode: Optional[str] = None,
   895	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[Dict[str, Any], None]:
   896	        """Main chat streaming generator producing SSE event dicts.
   897	
   898	        Steps per spec:
   899	        1) Load session + document
   900	        2) Save user message
   901	        3) Load recent history (last MAX_CHAT_HISTORY_TURNS rounds)
   902	        4) Retrieval top-5
   903	        5) Build prompt with numbered chunks
   904	        6) Stream Anthropic
   905	        7) Parse with RefParserFSM and yield events; ping every 15s
   906	        8) Save assistant message + citations
   907	        9) Yield done
   908	        """
   909	
   910	        # 1) Load session
   911	        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))
   912	        session_obj: Optional[ChatSession] = row.scalar_one_or_none()
   913	        if not session_obj:
   914	            yield sse("error", {"code": "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", "message": "会话不存在"})
   915	            return
   916	
   917	        document_id = session_obj.document_id
   918	        collection_id = getattr(session_obj, "collection_id", None)
   919	        is_collection_session = collection_id is not None and document_id is None
   920	
   921	        # Load document for custom instructions (single-doc sessions)
   922	        doc = await db.get(Document, document_id) if document_id else None
   923	
   924	        # For collection sessions, load all document IDs and filenames

   927	        if is_collection_session:

   930	                    collection_documents.c.collection_id == collection_id
   931	                )
   932	            )
   933	            collection_doc_ids = [row[0] for row in cd_rows.all()]
   934	            if collection_doc_ids:

   937	                )

   939	                    collection_doc_names[drow[0]] = drow[1]
   940	
   941	        # Resolve mode → model (mode is the ONLY way to select a model)
   942	        effective_mode = mode if mode in settings.MODE_MODELS else "balanced"
   943	        effective_model = settings.MODE_MODELS[effective_mode]
   944	
   945	        # Force demo model for anonymous users on demo documents
   946	        if user is None and doc and doc.demo_slug:
   947	            effective_model = settings.DEMO_LLM_MODEL
   948	            effective_mode = "quick"
   949	
   950	        # Premium mode gating: require Plus or Pro plan
   951	        if effective_mode in settings.PREMIUM_MODES:
   952	            user_plan = (user.plan or "free").lower() if user else "free"
   953	            if user_plan == "free":
   954	                yield sse(
   955	                    "error",
   956	                    {
   957	                        "code": "MODE_NOT_ALLOWED",
   958	                        "message": "Upgrade to Plus to use this mode",
   959	                        "required_plan": "plus",
   960	                    },
   961	                )
   962	                return
   963	
   964	        action_plan = await action_planner.plan(
   965	            user_message,
   966	            is_collection=is_collection_session,
   967	            locale=locale,
   968	        )
   969	        if not action_plan.uses_rag_answer_path:
   970	            async for ev in self._tool_action_stream(
   971	                session_id=session_id,
   972	                user_message=user_message,
   973	                db=db,
   974	                user=user,
   975	                locale=locale,
   976	                domain_mode=domain_mode,
   977	                document_id=document_id,
   978	                collection_doc_ids=collection_doc_ids,
   979	                action_plan=action_plan,
   980	            ):
   981	                yield ev
   982	            return
   983	
   984	        query_route = query_router.route(
   985	            user_message,
   986	            is_collection=is_collection_session,
   987	            domain_mode=domain_mode,
   988	        )
   989	
   990	        # Pre-debit estimated credits BEFORE streaming (prevents TOCTOU + free rides)
   991	        pre_debited = 0
   992	        predebit_ledger_id = None
   993	        if user is not None:
   994	            estimated = credit_service.get_estimated_cost(effective_mode)
   995	            if query_route.primary_intent == QueryIntent.DOCUMENT_SUMMARY:
   996	                estimated = max(estimated, estimated * 2)
   997	            predebit_ledger_id = await credit_service.debit_credits(
   998	                db, user_id=user.id, cost=estimated,
   999	                reason="chat", ref_type="mode", ref_id=effective_mode,
  1000	            )
  1001	            if predebit_ledger_id:
  1002	                pre_debited = estimated
  1003	                await db.commit()

  1005	                balance = await credit_service.get_user_credits(db, user.id)
  1006	                yield sse(
  1007	                    "error",

  1014	                )

  1017	        setup_error_code = "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR"

  1039	            claude_messages: List[dict] = []
  1040	            for m in history_msgs:
  1041	                claude_messages.append({"role": m.role, "content": m.content})

  1043	            # 4) Route + retrieval (with error handling — e.g. Qdrant down or no vectors yet).
  1044	            # Whole-document summaries must not use ordinary semantic top-k: vague
  1045	            # summary prompts frequently retrieve tables/appendices instead of

  1061	                )
  1062	                retrieval_strategy = "document_summary_context"
  1063	            elif (
  1064	                query_route.primary_intent == QueryIntent.DOCUMENT_SUMMARY
  1065	                and is_collection_session
  1066	                and collection_doc_ids
  1067	            ):
  1068	                retrieved = await document_brief_service.get_collection_summary_context(
  1069	                    db,
  1070	                    collection_doc_ids,
  1071	                    max_chunks=24,
  1072	                    max_docs=8,
  1073	                )
  1074	                retrieval_strategy = "collection_summary_context"
  1075	            elif is_collection_session and collection_doc_ids:
  1076	                corrective = await corrective_retrieval_service.retrieve_multi(
  1077	                    user_message,
  1078	                    query_route,
  1079	                    collection_doc_ids,
  1080	                    top_k=8,
  1081	                    db=db,
  1082	                )
  1083	                retrieved = corrective.retrieved
  1084	                retrieval_strategy = corrective.strategy
  1085	                retrieval_evaluation = corrective.evaluation
  1086	                retrieval_plan = corrective.plan
  1087	            elif document_id:
  1088	                corrective = await corrective_retrieval_service.retrieve_single(
  1089	                    user_message,
  1090	                    query_route,
  1091	                    document_id,
  1092	                    top_k=8,
  1093	                    db=db,
  1094	                )
  1095	                retrieved = corrective.retrieved
  1096	                retrieval_strategy = corrective.strategy
  1097	                retrieval_evaluation = corrective.evaluation
  1098	                retrieval_plan = corrective.plan
  1099	            else:
  1100	                retrieved = []
  1101	
  1102	            # 5) Build prompt (system)
  1103	            setup_error_code = "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR"
  1104	            numbered_chunks: List[str] = []
  1105	            chunk_map: dict[int, _ChunkInfo] = {}
  1106	            for idx, item in enumerate(retrieved, start=1):
  1107	                # Heuristic truncation to ~350 tokens (roughly 1200-1400 chars)
  1108	                text = item["text"] or ""
  1109	                truncated = text[:1400]
  1110	                chunk_doc_id = item.get("document_id")
  1111	                doc_label = ""
  1112	                if is_collection_session and chunk_doc_id:
  1113	                    fname = collection_doc_names.get(chunk_doc_id, "")
  1114	                    if fname:
  1115	                        doc_label = f"(from: {fname}) "
  1116	                plan_label = _safe_plan_label(item.get("retrieval_plan_step"))
  1117	                evidence_label = f"(evidence: {plan_label}) " if plan_label else ""
  1118	                numbered_chunks.append(f"[{idx}] {doc_label}{evidence_label}{truncated}")
  1119	                chunk_map[idx] = _ChunkInfo(
  1120	                    id=item["chunk_id"],
  1121	                    page_start=int(item["page"]),
  1122	                    page_end=int(item.get("page_end", item["page"])),
  1123	                    bboxes=item.get("bboxes") or [],
  1124	                    text=text,
  1125	                    section_title=item.get("section_title") or "",
  1126	                    document_id=chunk_doc_id if chunk_doc_id else document_id,
  1127	                    document_filename=collection_doc_names.get(chunk_doc_id, "")
  1128	                    if chunk_doc_id
  1129	                    else "",
  1130	                    score=item.get("score", 0.0),
  1131	                    table_id=str(item.get("table_id")) if item.get("table_id") else None,
  1132	                    retrieval_modality=str(item.get("retrieval_modality") or "text"),
  1133	                )
  1134	
  1135	            rules = get_rules_for_model(
  1136	                effective_model, is_collection=is_collection_session
  1137	            )
  1138	
  1139	            if is_collection_session and retrieval_strategy == "collection_summary_context":
  1140	                doc_list = ", ".join(collection_doc_names.values()) if collection_doc_names else "(no documents)"
  1141	                system_prompt = (
  1142	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. The user is asking for a broad summary across a document collection.\n\n"
  1143	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1144	                    + f"## Available Documents\n{doc_list}\n\n"
  1145	                    + "## Collection Coverage Fragments\n"
  1146	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1147	                    + "\n\n## Summary Rules\n"
  1148	                    + "1. Treat these fragments as representative coverage selected across the collection, not as semantic search results for a narrow question.\n"
  1149	                    + "2. Do NOT say the collection is just unrelated fragments merely because the context is excerpted.\n"
  1150	                    + "3. Summarize shared themes, document-specific points, and important caveats when supported.\n"
  1151	                    + "4. If coverage is incomplete, say the answer is based on the cited representative sections instead of refusing.\n"
  1152	                    + "5. Cite every factual paragraph or bullet using the fragment numbers listed above.\n"
  1153	                    + "6. Your response language MUST match the language of the user's question.\n"
  1154	                    + _citation_contract()
  1155	                )
  1156	            elif is_collection_session:
  1157	                doc_list = ", ".join(collection_doc_names.values()) if collection_doc_names else "(no documents)"
  1158	                system_prompt = (
  1159	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on fragments from multiple documents.\n\n"
  1160	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1161	                    + f"## Available Documents\n{doc_list}\n\n"
  1162	                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
  1163	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1164	                    + _retrieval_quality_contract(retrieval_evaluation, retrieval_strategy)
  1165	                    + _query_plan_contract(retrieval_plan)
  1166	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1167	                    + _citation_contract()
  1168	                )
  1169	            elif retrieval_strategy == "document_summary_context":
  1170	                system_prompt = (
  1171	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. The user is asking for a broad, whole-document summary.\n\n"
  1172	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1173	                    + "## Document Coverage Fragments\n"
  1174	                    + (
  1175	                        "\n".join(numbered_chunks)
  1176	                        if numbered_chunks
  1177	                        else "(none)"
  1178	                    )
  1179	                    + "\n\n## Summary Rules\n"
  1180	                    + "1. Treat these fragments as representative coverage selected across the document, not as semantic search results for a narrow question.\n"
  1181	                    + "2. Do NOT say the user's ready document is not a complete document merely because the context is excerpted.\n"
  1182	                    + "3. Produce a useful document-level summary with clear headings, key points, and important caveats when supported.\n"
  1183	                    + "4. If coverage is incomplete, say the answer is based on the cited representative sections instead of refusing.\n"
  1184	                    + "5. Cite every factual paragraph or bullet using the fragment numbers listed above.\n"
  1185	                    + "6. Your response language MUST match the language of the user's question.\n"
  1186	                    + _citation_contract()
  1187	                )
  1188	            else:
  1189	                system_prompt = (
  1190	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on the following document fragments.\n\n"
  1191	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1192	                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
  1193	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1194	                    + _retrieval_quality_contract(retrieval_evaluation, retrieval_strategy)
  1195	                    + _query_plan_contract(retrieval_plan)
  1196	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1197	                    + _citation_contract()
  1198	                )
  1199	
  1200	            # Inject custom instructions if present
  1201	            if doc and doc.custom_instructions:
  1202	                system_prompt += (
  1203	                    "\n## Custom Instructions\n"
  1204	                    "The user has provided the following custom instructions for this document. Follow them:\n"
  1205	                    + doc.custom_instructions + "\n"
  1206	                )
  1207	
  1208	            # Inject domain-specific rules (legal/academic mode overlay)
  1209	            # Frontend always sends domain_mode: null (default) or "legal"/"academic"
  1210	            # domain_mode=None means Default (no extra rules), string means apply rules
  1211	            if domain_mode:
  1212	                from app.core.model_profiles import DOMAIN_RULES
  1213	                domain_rules = DOMAIN_RULES.get(domain_mode)
  1214	                if domain_rules:
  1215	                    base_rule_count = len(rules.strip().split('\n'))
  1216	                    domain_rules_text = f"\n\n## {domain_mode.title()} Mode Rules\n"
  1217	                    for i, rule in enumerate(domain_rules, start=base_rule_count + 1):
  1218	                        domain_rules_text += f"{i}. {rule}\n"
  1219	                    system_prompt += domain_rules_text
  1220	
  1221	            # Persist domain_mode to session (null clears, string sets)
  1222	            if domain_mode != session_obj.domain_mode:
  1223	                session_obj.domain_mode = domain_mode
  1224	                await db.commit()
  1225	
  1226	        except Exception as e:
  1227	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:

  1229	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1230	                except Exception:
  1231	                    logger.exception(
  1232	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits during chat setup failure for user %s",
  1233	                        user.id,
  1234	                    )
  1235	            yield _safe_sse("error", setup_error_code, e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1236	            return
  1237	
  1238	        # 6) Stream from the configured OpenAI-compatible LLM provider
  1239	        try:
  1240	            client = _get_llm_client(effective_model)
  1241	        except Exception as e:
  1242	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1243	                try:
  1244	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1245	                except Exception:
  1246	                    logger.exception(
  1247	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits before LLM client setup for user %s",
  1248	                        user.id,
  1249	                    )
  1250	            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1251	            return
  1252	
  1253	        # Build OpenAI-format messages (system + history)
  1254	        # cache_control is Anthropic-specific — only include for Anthropic models
  1255	        profile = get_model_profile(effective_model)
  1256	        if profile.supports_cache_control:
  1257	            sys_msg: dict = {
  1258	                "role": "system",
  1259	                "content": [
  1260	                    {
  1261	                        "type": "text",
  1262	                        "text": system_prompt,
  1263	                        "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"},
  1264	                    }
  1265	                ],
  1266	            }
  1267	        else:
  1268	            sys_msg = {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}
  1269	        openai_messages = [sys_msg] + claude_messages
  1270	
  1271	        assistant_text_parts: List[str] = []
  1272	        citations: List[dict] = []
  1273	        fsm = RefParserFSM(chunk_map)
  1274	
  1275	        last_ping = time.monotonic()
  1276	        prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1277	        output_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1278	        llm_start = time.time()
  1279	        first_token_logged = False
  1280	        token_count = 0
  1281	        finish_reason: Optional[str] = None
  1282	
  1283	        try:
  1284	            create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
  1285	                "model": effective_model,
  1286	                "max_tokens": profile.max_tokens,
  1287	                "temperature": profile.temperature,
  1288	                "messages": openai_messages,
  1289	                "stream": True,
  1290	            }
  1291	            if profile.supports_stream_options:
  1292	                create_kwargs["stream_options"] = {"include_usage": True}
  1293	            _apply_provider_options(create_kwargs, effective_model)
  1294	            stream = await client.chat.completions.create(**create_kwargs)
  1295	
  1296	            async for chunk in stream:
  1297	                # Extract text delta
  1298	                if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
  1299	                    text = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
  1300	                    token_count += 1
  1301	                    if not first_token_logged:
  1302	                        first_token_logged = True
  1303	                        latency = time.time() - llm_start
  1304	                        logger.info("LLM first_token_latency=%.2fs model=%s", latency, effective_model)
  1305	                    # 7) Feed FSM and emit events
  1306	                    for ev in fsm.feed(text):
  1307	                        if ev["event"] == "token":
  1308	                            assistant_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1309	                        elif ev["event"] == "citation":
  1310	                            citations.append(ev["data"])
  1311	                        yield ev
  1312	
  1313	                # Track finish_reason from choices
  1314	                if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].finish_reason:
  1315	                    finish_reason = chunk.choices[0].finish_reason
  1316	
  1317	                # Extract usage if present (last chunk)
  1318	                if hasattr(chunk, "usage") and chunk.usage:
  1319	                    prompt_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "prompt_tokens", None)
  1320	                    output_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "completion_tokens", None)
  1321	
  1322	                # Ping every 15 seconds
  1323	                now = time.monotonic()
  1324	                if now - last_ping >= 15.0:
  1325	                    yield sse("ping", {})
  1326	                    last_ping = now
  1327	
  1328	            # Flush at stream end
  1329	            for ev in fsm.flush():
  1330	                if ev["event"] == "token":
  1331	                    assistant_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1332	                yield ev
  1333	
  1334	            if not citations:
  1335	                assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
  1336	                fallback_citations = _fallback_citations(assistant_snapshot, chunk_map)
  1337	                if fallback_citations:
  1338	                    logger.warning(
  1339	                        "LLM emitted no citation markers; generated %d fallback citations model=%s",
  1340	                        len(fallback_citations),
  1341	                        effective_model,
  1342	                    )
  1343	                    for citation in fallback_citations:
  1344	                        citations.append(citation)
  1345	                        yield sse("citation", citation)
  1346	
  1347	            # Warn if response was truncated due to token limit
  1348	            if finish_reason == "length":
  1349	                logger.warning(
  1350	                    "LLM response truncated (finish_reason=length) model=%s max_tokens=%d output_tokens=%s",
  1351	                    effective_model, profile.max_tokens, output_tokens,
  1352	                )
  1353	                yield sse("truncated", {"reason": "max_tokens"})
  1354	
  1355	            total_time = time.time() - llm_start
  1356	            final_token_count = int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else token_count
  1357	            logger.info(
  1358	                "LLM total_latency=%.2fs tokens=%d model=%s",
  1359	                total_time,
  1360	                final_token_count,
  1361	                effective_model,
  1362	            )
  1363	
  1364	        except Exception as e:
  1365	            # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
  1366	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1367	                try:
  1368	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1369	                except Exception:
  1370	                    logger.exception(
  1371	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after LLM error for user %s",
  1372	                        user.id,
  1373	                    )
  1374	            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1375	            return
  1376	
  1377	        # 9) Save assistant message + citations
  1378	        assistant_text = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
  1379	        verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1380	            assistant_text,
  1381	            citations,
  1382	            set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1383	            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1384	        )
  1385	        verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1386	        repair_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None
  1387	        if verification_report.status != "pass" and finish_reason != "length":
  1388	            yield sse("tool_status", {"message": "Checking citation support..."})
  1389	            repair = await _try_repair_rag_answer(
  1390	                client=client,
  1391	                model=effective_model,
  1392	                profile=profile,
  1393	                user_message=user_message,
  1394	                assistant_text=assistant_text,
  1395	                citations=citations,
  1396	                chunk_map=chunk_map,
  1397	                numbered_chunks=numbered_chunks,
  1398	                verification=verification_payload,
  1399	                locale=locale,
  1400	            )
  1401	            if repair is not None:
  1402	                repair_metadata = repair.metadata
  1403	                if repair.prompt_tokens:
  1404	                    prompt_tokens = int(prompt_tokens or 0) + repair.prompt_tokens
  1405	                if repair.output_tokens:
  1406	                    output_tokens = int(output_tokens or 0) + repair.output_tokens
  1407	                if repair.applied:
  1408	                    assistant_text = repair.text
  1409	                    citations = repair.citations
  1410	                    verification_payload = repair.verification
  1411	                    verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1412	                        assistant_text,
  1413	                        citations,
  1414	                        set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1415	                        retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1416	                    )
  1417	                    verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1418	                    yield sse(
  1419	                        "answer_repaired",
  1420	                        {
  1421	                            "text": assistant_text,
  1422	                            "citations": citations,
  1423	                            "verification": verification_payload,
  1424	                        },
  1425	                    )
  1426	        if verification_report.status != "pass":
  1427	            logger.warning(
  1428	                "RAG verification status=%s score=%.3f claims=%d citations=%d reasons=%s",
  1429	                verification_report.status,
  1430	                verification_report.score,
  1431	                verification_report.claim_count,
  1432	                verification_report.citation_count,
  1433	                ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
  1434	            )
  1435	        try:
  1436	            asst_msg = Message(
  1437	                session_id=session_id,
  1438	                role="assistant",
  1439	                content=assistant_text,
  1440	                citations=citations or None,
  1441	                prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
  1442	                output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
  1443	            )
  1444	            db.add(asst_msg)
  1445	            await db.commit()
  1446	        except Exception:
  1447	            await db.rollback()
  1448	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1449	                try:
  1450	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1451	                except Exception:
  1452	                    logger.exception(
  1453	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after PERSIST_FAILED for user %s",
  1454	                        user.id,
  1455	                    )
  1456	            yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
  1457	            return
  1458	
  1459	        await _record_rag_verification_event(
  1460	            db,
  1461	            user=user,
  1462	            message_id=getattr(asst_msg, "id", None),
  1463	            verification=verification_payload,
  1464	            retrieval_strategy=retrieval_strategy,
  1465	            query_route=query_route,
  1466	            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1467	            repair_metadata=repair_metadata,
  1468	        )
  1469	
  1470	        # Credits: reconcile pre-debited estimate against actual cost
  1471	        if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1472	            pt = int(prompt_tokens or 0)
  1473	            ct = int(output_tokens or 0)
  1474	            try:
  1475	                actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(pt, ct, effective_model, mode=effective_mode)
  1476	                await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
  1477	                    db, user.id, predebit_ledger_id, pre_debited, actual_cost,
  1478	                )
  1479	                await credit_service.record_usage(
  1480	                    db,
  1481	                    user_id=user.id,
  1482	                    message_id=asst_msg.id,
  1483	                    model=effective_model,
  1484	                    prompt_tokens=pt,
  1485	                    completion_tokens=ct,
  1486	                    cost_credits=actual_cost,
  1487	                )
  1488	                await db.commit()
  1489	            except Exception as e:
  1490	                # Non-fatal accounting error
  1491	                yield _safe_sse("warn", "ACCOUNTING_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1492	
  1493	        # 10) done
  1494	        can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
  1495	        yield sse("done", {
  1496	            "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
  1497	            "citations_count": len(citations),
  1498	            "verification": verification_payload,
  1499	            "repair": repair_metadata,
  1500	            "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
  1501	            "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
  1502	        })
  1503	
  1504	    async def continue_stream(
  1505	        self,
  1506	        session_id: uuid.UUID,
  1507	        message_id: Optional[uuid.UUID],
  1508	        db: AsyncSession,
  1509	        user: Optional[User] = None,
  1510	        locale: Optional[str] = None,
  1511	        mode: Optional[str] = None,
  1512	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[Dict[str, Any], None]:
  1513	        """Continue a truncated assistant response, appending to the existing message."""
  1514	
  1515	        # 1) Load session
  1516	        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))
  1517	        session_obj: Optional[ChatSession] = row.scalar_one_or_none()
  1518	        if not session_obj:
  1519	            yield sse("error", {"code": "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Session not found"})
  1520	            return
  1521	
  1522	        document_id = session_obj.document_id
  1523	        collection_id = getattr(session_obj, "collection_id", None)
  1524	        is_collection_session = collection_id is not None and document_id is None
  1525	
  1526	        doc = await db.get(Document, document_id) if document_id else None
  1527	
  1528	        # For collection sessions, load document names
  1529	        collection_doc_names: dict[uuid.UUID, str] = {}
  1530	        if is_collection_session:
  1531	            from app.models.tables import collection_documents as cd_table
  1532	            cd_rows = await db.execute(
  1533	                select(cd_table.c.document_id).where(cd_table.c.collection_id == collection_id)
  1534	            )
  1535	            collection_doc_ids = [r[0] for r in cd_rows.all()]
  1536	            if collection_doc_ids:
  1537	                doc_rows = await db.execute(
  1538	                    select(Document.id, Document.filename).where(Document.id.in_(collection_doc_ids))
  1539	                )
  1540	                for drow in doc_rows.all():
  1541	                    collection_doc_names[drow[0]] = drow[1]
  1542	
  1543	        # 2) Load assistant message to continue
  1544	        if message_id:
  1545	            asst_msg = await db.get(Message, message_id)
  1546	        else:
  1547	            # Fall back to most recent assistant message in session
  1548	            result = await db.execute(
  1549	                select(Message)
  1550	                .where(Message.session_id == session_id, Message.role == "assistant")

 from app.core.config import settings

@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

codex
我现在在改 `chat_stream` 主体（较大块）：会把持久化前移、补 `persisted/settled` 标志、并在外层 `try/except CancelledError/finally` 做取消兜底。改完会立即对 `continue_stream` 做同样处理。

+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],

+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:

+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(

+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+

-                await credit_service.record_usage(
-                    db,
-                    user_id=user.id,
-                    message_id=asst_msg.id,
-                    model=effective_model,
-                    prompt_tokens=pt,
-                    completion_tokens=ct,
-                    cost_credits=actual_cost,
-                )
-                await db.commit()
-            except Exception as e:
-                # Non-fatal accounting error
-                yield _safe_sse("warn", "ACCOUNTING_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
-
-        # 10) done
-        can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
-        yield sse("done", {
-            "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
-            "citations_count": len(citations),
-            "verification": verification_payload,
-            "repair": repair_metadata,
-            "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
-            "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
-        })
+            # 10) done
+            can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
+            done_emitted = True
+            yield sse("done", {
+                "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
+                "citations_count": len(citations),
+                "verification": verification_payload,
+                "repair": repair_metadata,
+                "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
+                "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
+            })
+        except asyncio.CancelledError:
+            raise
+        finally:
+            if not done_emitted:
+                assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
+                has_partial_answer = bool(assistant_snapshot.strip())
+                if has_partial_answer and not persisted:
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+                                session_id=session_id,
+                                assistant_text=assistant_snapshot,
+                                citations=citations,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                            )
+                        persisted = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to persist partial assistant response on cancel/error for session %s",
+                            session_id,
+                        )
+                if (
+                    user is not None
+                    and pre_debited > 0
+                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
+                    and not settled
+                ):
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+                                user_id=user.id,
+                                pre_debited=pre_debited,
+                                predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
+                                has_answer=has_partial_answer,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                                model=effective_model,
+                                mode=effective_mode,
+                            )
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
+                            user.id,
+                        )
 
     async def continue_stream(
         self,

 from app.core.config import settings
 from app.core.model_profiles import get_model_profile, get_rules_for_model
+from app.models.database import AsyncSessionLocal
 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,
     Chunk,
@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -1195,227 +1279,297 @@

+                "repair": repair_metadata,
+                "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
+                "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
+            })
+        except asyncio.CancelledError:
+            raise
+        finally:
+            if not done_emitted:
+                assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
+                has_partial_answer = bool(assistant_snapshot.strip())
+                if has_partial_answer and not persisted:
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+                                session_id=session_id,
+                                assistant_text=assistant_snapshot,
+                                citations=citations,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                            )
+                        persisted = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to persist partial assistant response on cancel/error for session %s",
+                            session_id,
+                        )
+                if (
+                    user is not None
+                    and pre_debited > 0
+                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
+                    and not settled
+                ):
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+                                user_id=user.id,
+                                pre_debited=pre_debited,
+                                predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
+                                has_answer=has_partial_answer,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                                model=effective_model,
+                                mode=effective_mode,
+                            )
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
+                            user.id,
+                        )
 
     async def continue_stream(
         self,

apply patch

 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,

@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

+                            await _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+                                session_id=session_id,
+                                assistant_text=assistant_snapshot,
+                                citations=citations,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                            )
+                        persisted = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to persist partial assistant response on cancel/error for session %s",
+                            session_id,
+                        )
+                if (
+                    user is not None
+                    and pre_debited > 0
+                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
+                    and not settled
+                ):
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+                                user_id=user.id,
+                                pre_debited=pre_debited,
+                                predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
+                                has_answer=has_partial_answer,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                                model=effective_model,
+                                mode=effective_mode,
+                            )
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
+                            user.id,
+                        )
 
     async def continue_stream(
         self,

 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,

@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

+                    settled = True

+                            await _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+                                user_id=user.id,
+                                pre_debited=pre_debited,
+                                predebit_ledger_id=predebit_ledger_id,
+                                has_answer=has_partial_answer,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                                model=effective_model,
+                                mode=effective_mode,
+                            )
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
+                            user.id,
+                        )
 
     async def continue_stream(
         self,

codex
我刚补了 `settled=True` 标志位，但要再做一处修正：把 `persisted/settled` 的初始化提前到 setup 阶段之前，避免早期异常分支引用未定义变量。我先修这个再继续 `continue_stream`。

 from app.core.config import settings
 from app.core.model_profiles import get_model_profile, get_rules_for_model
+from app.models.database import AsyncSessionLocal
 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,
     Chunk,
@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -1143,6 +1227,7 @@

 from app.core.config import settings
 from app.core.model_profiles import get_model_profile, get_rules_for_model
+from app.models.database import AsyncSessionLocal
 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,
     Chunk,
@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

+            except Exception as e:
+                # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:

+
+            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(

 from app.core.config import settings
 from app.core.model_profiles import get_model_profile, get_rules_for_model
+from app.models.database import AsyncSessionLocal
 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,

@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1014,7 @@

+            except Exception as e:
+                # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:
+                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(

+                            user.id,

+            # 9) Save assistant draft before verification/repair (A2)

+                    role="assistant",
+                    content=assistant_text,
+                    citations=citations or None,
+                    prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+                    output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+                )
+                db.add(asst_msg)
+                await db.commit()
+                persisted = True
+            except Exception:
+                await db.rollback()
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:
+                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+                        settled = True

+                        logger.exception(

+                            user.id,
+                        )
+                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
+                return
+
+            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(

+                    verification_report.citation_count,
+                    ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
