  1577	    async def continue_stream(
  1578	        self,
  1579	        session_id: uuid.UUID,
  1580	        message_id: Optional[uuid.UUID],
  1581	        db: AsyncSession,
  1582	        user: Optional[User] = None,
  1583	        locale: Optional[str] = None,
  1584	        mode: Optional[str] = None,
  1585	    ) -> AsyncGenerator[Dict[str, Any], None]:
  1586	        """Continue a truncated assistant response, appending to the existing message."""
  1587	
  1588	        # 1) Load session
  1589	        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))
  1590	        session_obj: Optional[ChatSession] = row.scalar_one_or_none()
  1591	        if not session_obj:
  1592	            yield sse("error", {"code": "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Session not found"})
  1593	            return
  1594	
  1595	        document_id = session_obj.document_id
  1596	        collection_id = getattr(session_obj, "collection_id", None)
  1597	        is_collection_session = collection_id is not None and document_id is None
  1598	
  1599	        doc = await db.get(Document, document_id) if document_id else None
  1600	
  1601	        # For collection sessions, load document names
  1602	        collection_doc_names: dict[uuid.UUID, str] = {}
  1603	        if is_collection_session:
  1604	            from app.models.tables import collection_documents as cd_table
  1605	            cd_rows = await db.execute(
  1606	                select(cd_table.c.document_id).where(cd_table.c.collection_id == collection_id)
  1607	            )
  1608	            collection_doc_ids = [r[0] for r in cd_rows.all()]
  1609	            if collection_doc_ids:
  1610	                doc_rows = await db.execute(
  1611	                    select(Document.id, Document.filename).where(Document.id.in_(collection_doc_ids))
  1612	                )
  1613	                for drow in doc_rows.all():
  1614	                    collection_doc_names[drow[0]] = drow[1]
  1615	
  1616	        # 2) Load assistant message to continue
  1617	        if message_id:
  1618	            asst_msg = await db.get(Message, message_id)
  1619	        else:
  1620	            # Fall back to most recent assistant message in session
  1621	            result = await db.execute(
  1622	                select(Message)
  1623	                .where(Message.session_id == session_id, Message.role == "assistant")
  1624	                .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())
  1625	                .limit(1)
  1626	            )
  1627	            asst_msg = result.scalar_one_or_none()
  1628	
  1629	        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
  1630	            yield sse("error", {"code": "MESSAGE_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Assistant message not found"})
  1631	            return
  1632	
  1633	        if asst_msg.session_id != session_id:
  1634	            yield sse("error", {"code": "MESSAGE_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Message does not belong to this session"})
  1635	            return
  1636	
  1637	        # 3) Check continuation limit
  1638	        if asst_msg.continuation_count >= settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE:
  1639	            yield sse("error", {"code": "CONTINUATION_LIMIT", "message": "Maximum continuations reached"})
  1640	            return
  1641	
  1642	        # 4) Resolve mode → model
  1643	        effective_mode = mode if mode in settings.MODE_MODELS else "balanced"
  1644	        effective_model = settings.MODE_MODELS[effective_mode]
  1645	
  1646	        if user is None and doc and doc.demo_slug:
  1647	            effective_model = settings.DEMO_LLM_MODEL
  1648	            effective_mode = "quick"
  1649	
  1650	        if effective_mode in settings.PREMIUM_MODES:
  1651	            user_plan = (user.plan or "free").lower() if user else "free"
  1652	            if user_plan == "free":
  1653	                yield sse(
  1654	                    "error",
  1655	                    {
  1656	                        "code": "MODE_NOT_ALLOWED",
  1657	                        "message": "Upgrade to Plus to use this mode",
  1658	                        "required_plan": "plus",
  1659	                    },
  1660	                )
  1661	                return
  1662	
  1663	        # 5) Pre-debit credits
  1664	        pre_debited = 0
  1665	        predebit_ledger_id = None
  1666	        if user is not None:
  1667	            estimated = credit_service.get_estimated_cost(effective_mode)
  1668	            predebit_ledger_id = await credit_service.debit_credits(
  1669	                db, user_id=user.id, cost=estimated,
  1670	                reason="chat", ref_type="mode", ref_id=effective_mode,
  1671	            )
  1672	            if predebit_ledger_id:
  1673	                pre_debited = estimated
  1674	                await db.commit()
  1675	            else:
  1676	                balance = await credit_service.get_user_credits(db, user.id)
  1677	                yield sse("error", {
  1678	                    "code": "INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS",
  1679	                    "message": "Insufficient credits",
  1680	                    "required": estimated,
  1681	                    "balance": balance,
  1682	                })
  1683	                return
  1684	
  1685	        try:
  1686	            # 6) Reconstruct chunk_map from original citations
  1687	            chunk_map: dict[int, _ChunkInfo] = {}
  1688	            original_citations = asst_msg.citations or []
  1689	            if original_citations:
  1690	                chunk_ids_set: set[str] = set()
  1691	                ref_to_chunk_id: dict[int, str] = {}
  1692	                ref_to_citation: dict[int, dict] = {}
  1693	                table_ids_set: set[str] = set()
  1694	                for cit in original_citations:
  1695	                    if not isinstance(cit, dict):
  1696	                        continue
  1697	                    cid = cit.get("chunk_id")
  1698	                    ref = cit.get("ref_index")
  1699	                    if cid and ref is not None:
  1700	                        try:
  1701	                            normalized_ref = int(ref)
  1702	                            normalized_cid = str(uuid.UUID(str(cid)))
  1703	                        except Exception:
  1704	                            continue
  1705	                        chunk_ids_set.add(normalized_cid)
  1706	                        ref_to_chunk_id[normalized_ref] = normalized_cid
  1707	                        ref_to_citation[normalized_ref] = cit
  1708	                        table_id = cit.get("table_id")
  1709	                        if table_id:
  1710	                            try:
  1711	                                table_ids_set.add(str(uuid.UUID(str(table_id))))
  1712	                            except Exception:
  1713	                                pass
  1714	
  1715	                if chunk_ids_set:
  1716	                    chunk_uuids = [uuid.UUID(c) for c in chunk_ids_set]
  1717	                    chunk_rows = await db.execute(
  1718	                        select(Chunk).where(Chunk.id.in_(chunk_uuids))
  1719	                    )
  1720	                    chunks_by_id: dict[str, Chunk] = {}
  1721	                    for ch in chunk_rows.scalars():
  1722	                        chunks_by_id[str(ch.id)] = ch
  1723	
  1724	                    tables_by_id: dict[str, DocumentTable] = {}
  1725	                    if table_ids_set:
  1726	                        table_uuids = [uuid.UUID(tid) for tid in table_ids_set]
  1727	                        table_rows = await db.execute(
  1728	                            select(DocumentTable).where(DocumentTable.id.in_(table_uuids))
  1729	                        )
  1730	                        for table in table_rows.scalars():
  1731	                            tables_by_id[str(table.id)] = table
  1732	
  1733	                    for ref_num, cid in ref_to_chunk_id.items():
  1734	                        ch = chunks_by_id.get(cid)
  1735	                        if ch:
  1736	                            citation = dict(ref_to_citation.get(ref_num) or {})
  1737	                            table_id = citation.get("table_id")
  1738	                            if table_id and not citation.get("table_context"):
  1739	                                table = tables_by_id.get(str(table_id))
  1740	                                if table:
  1741	                                    citation["table_context"] = table_evidence_text(table)
  1742	                                    citation["page"] = table.page
  1743	                                    citation["page_end"] = table.page
  1744	                            chunk_map[ref_num] = _chunk_info_from_persisted_citation(
  1745	                                ch,
  1746	                                citation,
  1747	                                collection_doc_names,
  1748	                            )
  1749	
  1750	            # 7) Load conversation history
  1751	            max_turns = int(settings.MAX_CHAT_HISTORY_TURNS or 6)
  1752	            max_msgs = max_turns * 2
  1753	            msgs_row = await db.execute(
  1754	                select(Message)
  1755	                .where(Message.session_id == session_id)
  1756	                .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())
  1757	                .limit(max_msgs + 1)
  1758	            )
  1759	            history_msgs: List[Message] = list(msgs_row.scalars().all())
  1760	            history_msgs.reverse()
  1761	
  1762	            claude_messages: List[dict] = []
  1763	            for m in history_msgs:
  1764	                claude_messages.append({"role": m.role, "content": m.content})
  1765	
  1766	            # Add continuation prompt
  1767	            claude_messages.append({
  1768	                "role": "user",
  1769	                "content": _continuation_prompt(locale, asst_msg.content),
  1770	            })
  1771	
  1772	            # 8) Build system prompt with chunk_map context
  1773	            numbered_chunks: List[str] = []
  1774	            for idx in sorted(chunk_map.keys()):
  1775	                info = chunk_map[idx]
  1776	                text = (info.text or "")[:1400]
  1777	                doc_label = ""
  1778	                if is_collection_session and info.document_id:
  1779	                    fname = collection_doc_names.get(info.document_id, "")
  1780	                    if fname:
  1781	                        doc_label = f"(from: {fname}) "
  1782	                numbered_chunks.append(f"[{idx}] {doc_label}{text}")
  1783	
  1784	            rules = get_rules_for_model(
  1785	                effective_model, is_collection=is_collection_session
  1786	            )
  1787	
  1788	            if is_collection_session:
  1789	                doc_list = ", ".join(collection_doc_names.values()) if collection_doc_names else "(no documents)"
  1790	                system_prompt = (
  1791	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on fragments from multiple documents.\n\n"
  1792	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1793	                    + f"## Available Documents\n{doc_list}\n\n"
  1794	                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
  1795	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1796	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1797	                    + _citation_contract()
  1798	                )
  1799	            else:
  1800	                system_prompt = (
  1801	                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on the following document fragments.\n\n"
  1802	                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
  1803	                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
  1804	                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
  1805	                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
  1806	                    + _citation_contract()
  1807	                )
  1808	
  1809	            if doc and doc.custom_instructions:
  1810	                system_prompt += (
  1811	                    "\n## Custom Instructions\n"
  1812	                    "The user has provided the following custom instructions for this document. Follow them:\n"
  1813	                    + doc.custom_instructions + "\n"
  1814	                )
  1815	
  1816	            system_prompt += "\n" + _continuation_system_rule(locale, asst_msg.content)
  1817	        except Exception as e:
  1818	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1819	                try:
  1820	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1821	                except Exception:
  1822	                    logger.exception(
  1823	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits during continuation setup failure for user %s",
  1824	                        user.id,
  1825	                    )
  1826	            yield _safe_sse("error", "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1827	            return
  1828	
  1829	        # 9) Stream from LLM
  1830	        try:
  1831	            client = _get_llm_client(effective_model)
  1832	        except Exception as e:
  1833	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1834	                try:
  1835	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1836	                except Exception:
  1837	                    logger.exception(
  1838	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits before continuation LLM client setup for user %s",
  1839	                        user.id,
  1840	                    )
  1841	            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1842	            return
  1843	        profile = get_model_profile(effective_model)
  1844	
  1845	        if profile.supports_cache_control:
  1846	            sys_msg: dict = {
  1847	                "role": "system",
  1848	                "content": [{"type": "text", "text": system_prompt, "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}}],
  1849	            }
  1850	        else:
  1851	            sys_msg = {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}
  1852	        openai_messages = [sys_msg] + claude_messages
  1853	
  1854	        continuation_text_parts: List[str] = []
  1855	        new_citations: List[dict] = []
  1856	        fsm = RefParserFSM(chunk_map)
  1857	        fsm.char_offset = len(asst_msg.content)  # Offset citations relative to full text
  1858	
  1859	        last_ping = time.monotonic()
  1860	        prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1861	        output_tokens: Optional[int] = None
  1862	        finish_reason: Optional[str] = None
  1863	
  1864	        try:
  1865	            create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
  1866	                "model": effective_model,
  1867	                "max_tokens": profile.max_tokens,
  1868	                "temperature": profile.temperature,
  1869	                "messages": openai_messages,
  1870	                "stream": True,
  1871	            }
  1872	            if profile.supports_stream_options:
  1873	                create_kwargs["stream_options"] = {"include_usage": True}
  1874	            _apply_provider_options(create_kwargs, effective_model)
  1875	            stream = await client.chat.completions.create(**create_kwargs)
  1876	
  1877	            async for chunk in stream:
  1878	                if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
  1879	                    text = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
  1880	                    for ev in fsm.feed(text):
  1881	                        if ev["event"] == "token":
  1882	                            continuation_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1883	                        elif ev["event"] == "citation":
  1884	                            new_citations.append(ev["data"])
  1885	                        yield ev
  1886	
  1887	                if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].finish_reason:
  1888	                    finish_reason = chunk.choices[0].finish_reason
  1889	
  1890	                if hasattr(chunk, "usage") and chunk.usage:
  1891	                    prompt_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "prompt_tokens", None)
  1892	                    output_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "completion_tokens", None)
  1893	
  1894	                now = time.monotonic()
  1895	                if now - last_ping >= 15.0:
  1896	                    yield sse("ping", {})
  1897	                    last_ping = now
  1898	
  1899	            for ev in fsm.flush():
  1900	                if ev["event"] == "token":
  1901	                    continuation_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
  1902	                yield ev
  1903	
  1904	            if not new_citations:
  1905	                continuation_snapshot = "".join(continuation_text_parts)
  1906	                fallback_citations = _fallback_citations(
  1907	                    continuation_snapshot,
  1908	                    chunk_map,
  1909	                    base_offset=len(asst_msg.content or ""),
  1910	                )
  1911	                if fallback_citations:
  1912	                    logger.warning(
  1913	                        "LLM emitted no continuation citation markers; generated %d fallback citations model=%s",
  1914	                        len(fallback_citations),
  1915	                        effective_model,
  1916	                    )
  1917	                    for citation in fallback_citations:
  1918	                        new_citations.append(citation)
  1919	                        yield sse("citation", citation)
  1920	
  1921	            if finish_reason == "length":
  1922	                yield sse("truncated", {"reason": "max_tokens"})
  1923	
  1924	        except Exception as e:
  1925	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  1926	                try:
  1927	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  1928	                except Exception:
  1929	                    logger.exception(
  1930	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after continuation LLM error for user %s",
  1931	                        user.id,
  1932	                    )
  1933	            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  1934	            return
  1935	
  1936	        # 10) Update existing message (append text, merge citations, bump count)
  1937	        continuation_text = "".join(continuation_text_parts)
  1938	        full_assistant_text = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
  1939	        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + new_citations
  1940	        verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1941	            full_assistant_text,
  1942	            merged_citations,
  1943	            set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1944	            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1945	        )
  1946	        verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1947	        repair_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None
  1948	        if verification_report.status != "pass" and finish_reason != "length":
  1949	            yield sse("tool_status", {"message": "Checking citation support..."})
  1950	            repair = await _try_repair_rag_answer(
  1951	                client=client,
  1952	                model=effective_model,
  1953	                profile=profile,
  1954	                user_message=_continuation_prompt(locale, asst_msg.content),
  1955	                assistant_text=full_assistant_text,
  1956	                citations=merged_citations,
  1957	                chunk_map=chunk_map,
  1958	                numbered_chunks=numbered_chunks,
  1959	                verification=verification_payload,
  1960	                locale=locale,
  1961	            )
  1962	            if repair is not None:
  1963	                repair_metadata = repair.metadata
  1964	                if repair.prompt_tokens:
  1965	                    prompt_tokens = int(prompt_tokens or 0) + repair.prompt_tokens
  1966	                if repair.output_tokens:
  1967	                    output_tokens = int(output_tokens or 0) + repair.output_tokens
  1968	                if repair.applied:
  1969	                    full_assistant_text = repair.text
  1970	                    merged_citations = repair.citations
  1971	                    verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
  1972	                        full_assistant_text,
  1973	                        merged_citations,
  1974	                        set(chunk_map.keys()),
  1975	                        retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  1976	                    )
  1977	                    verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
  1978	                    yield sse(
  1979	                        "answer_repaired",
  1980	                        {
  1981	                            "text": full_assistant_text,
  1982	                            "citations": merged_citations,
  1983	                            "verification": verification_payload,
  1984	                        },
  1985	                    )
  1986	        if verification_report.status != "pass":
  1987	            logger.warning(
  1988	                "RAG continuation verification status=%s score=%.3f claims=%d citations=%d reasons=%s",
  1989	                verification_report.status,
  1990	                verification_report.score,
  1991	                verification_report.claim_count,
  1992	                verification_report.citation_count,
  1993	                ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
  1994	            )
  1995	        try:
  1996	            asst_msg.content = full_assistant_text
  1997	            asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
  1998	            asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
  1999	            asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + (int(output_tokens) if output_tokens else 0)
  2000	            await db.commit()
  2001	        except Exception:
  2002	            await db.rollback()
  2003	            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  2004	                try:
  2005	                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
  2006	                except Exception:
  2007	                    logger.exception(
  2008	                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after continuation PERSIST_FAILED for user %s",
  2009	                        user.id,
  2010	                    )
  2011	            yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save continuation"})
  2012	            return
  2013	
  2014	        await _record_rag_verification_event(
  2015	            db,
  2016	            user=user,
  2017	            message_id=getattr(asst_msg, "id", None),
  2018	            verification=verification_payload,
  2019	            retrieval_strategy="continuation",
  2020	            query_route=None,
  2021	            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
  2022	            repair_metadata=repair_metadata,
  2023	        )
  2024	
  2025	        # Credits: reconcile
  2026	        if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
  2027	            pt = int(prompt_tokens or 0)
  2028	            ct = int(output_tokens or 0)
  2029	            try:
  2030	                actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(pt, ct, effective_model, mode=effective_mode)
  2031	                await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
  2032	                    db, user.id, predebit_ledger_id, pre_debited, actual_cost,
  2033	                )
  2034	                await credit_service.record_usage(
  2035	                    db,
  2036	                    user_id=user.id,
  2037	                    message_id=asst_msg.id,
  2038	                    model=effective_model,
  2039	                    prompt_tokens=pt,
  2040	                    completion_tokens=ct,
  2041	                    cost_credits=actual_cost,
  2042	                )
  2043	                await db.commit()
  2044	            except Exception as e:
  2045	                yield _safe_sse("warn", "ACCOUNTING_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
  2046	
  2047	        # 11) done
  2048	        can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
  2049	        yield sse("done", {
  2050	            "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
  2051	            "citations_count": len(merged_citations) if merged_citations else 0,
  2052	            "verification": verification_payload,
  2053	            "repair": repair_metadata,
  2054	            "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
  2055	            "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
  2056	        })
  2057	
  2058	
  2059	# Singleton service
  2060	chat_service = ChatService()

 import sqlalchemy as sa
 from openai import AsyncOpenAI
 from sqlalchemy import select
@@ -14,6 +16,7 @@
 
 from app.core.config import settings
 from app.core.model_profiles import get_model_profile, get_rules_for_model
+from app.models.database import AsyncSessionLocal
 from app.models.tables import (
     ChatSession,
     Chunk,
@@ -554,6 +557,87 @@
     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1014,7 @@
                 )
                 return
 
+        settled = False
         setup_error_code = "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR"
         try:
             # 2) Save user message
@@ -1143,6 +1228,7 @@
             if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                 try:
                     await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+                    settled = True
                 except Exception:
                     logger.exception(
                         "Failed to refund pre-debited credits during chat setup failure for user %s",
@@ -1158,6 +1244,7 @@
             if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:

@@ -1195,227 +1282,297 @@

         token_count = 0

+        asst_msg: Optional[Message] = None
+        repair_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None
+        persisted = False
+        settled = False

         try:

+            try:
+                create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
+                    "model": effective_model,
+                    "max_tokens": profile.max_tokens,
+                    "temperature": profile.temperature,
+                    "messages": openai_messages,
+                    "stream": True,
+                }
+                if profile.supports_stream_options:

+                _apply_provider_options(create_kwargs, effective_model)

+                async for chunk in stream:

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1015,7 @@

                 return

             # 2) Save user message

+            except Exception as e:
+                # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:
+                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)

+                    except Exception:

+                    role="assistant",

+                    citations=citations or None,
+                    prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+                    output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+                )
+                db.add(asst_msg)
+                await db.commit()
+                persisted = True
+            except Exception:
+                await db.rollback()
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:
+                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+                        settled = True

+                        logger.exception(

+                            user.id,
+                        )
+                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
+                return
+
+            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
+                assistant_text,
+                citations,
+                set(chunk_map.keys()),
+                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),

+            verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()

+                yield sse("tool_status", {"message": "Checking citation support..."})
+                repair = await _try_repair_rag_answer(

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1015,7 @@
                 )
                 return
 
+        settled = False
         setup_error_code = "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR"
         try:
             # 2) Save user message

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1015,7 @@

             # 2) Save user message

+            try:
+                create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
+                    "model": effective_model,

+                    "temperature": profile.temperature,
+                    "messages": openai_messages,

+                async for chunk in stream:
+                    # Extract text delta
+                    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
+                        text = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
+                        token_count += 1
+                        if not first_token_logged:
+                            first_token_logged = True
+                            latency = time.time() - llm_start
+                            logger.info("LLM first_token_latency=%.2fs model=%s", latency, effective_model)
+                        # 7) Feed FSM and emit events
+                        for ev in fsm.feed(text):
+                            if ev["event"] == "token":
+                                assistant_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
+                            elif ev["event"] == "citation":
+                                citations.append(ev["data"])
+                            yield ev

+            # 10) Persist continuation draft before verification/repair (A2)

+                return
+
+            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(

+                merged_citations,
+                set(chunk_map.keys()),
+                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),

+            verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()

+                    verification_report.score,
+                    verification_report.claim_count,
+                    verification_report.citation_count,
+                    ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
+                )

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

+            # 10) done
+            can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE

+            yield sse("done", {
+                "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
+                "citations_count": len(citations),
+                "verification": verification_payload,
+                "repair": repair_metadata,
+                "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",

+        except asyncio.CancelledError:
+            raise
+        finally:
+            if not done_emitted:
+                assistant_snapshot = "".join(assistant_text_parts)
+                has_partial_answer = bool(assistant_snapshot.strip())
+                if has_partial_answer and not persisted:
+                    try:
+                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
+                            await _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+                                session_id=session_id,
+                                assistant_text=assistant_snapshot,
+                                citations=citations,
+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,

+                        persisted = True

+                                prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
+                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
+                                model=effective_model,
+                                mode=effective_mode,
+                            )
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to settle pre-debit on cancel/error for user %s",
+                            user.id,
+                        )

+                if finish_reason == "length":

+            continuation_text = "".join(continuation_text_parts)

+                asst_msg.content = full_assistant_text
+                asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+                asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+                asst_msg.output_tokens = base_output_tokens + int(output_tokens or 0)

+            except Exception:

    async def continue_stream(
        self,
        session_id: uuid.UUID,
        message_id: Optional[uuid.UUID],
        db: AsyncSession,
        user: Optional[User] = None,
        locale: Optional[str] = None,
        mode: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> AsyncGenerator[Dict[str, Any], None]:
        """Continue a truncated assistant response, appending to the existing message."""
    
        # 1) Load session
        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))
        session_obj: Optional[ChatSession] = row.scalar_one_or_none()
        if not session_obj:
            yield sse("error", {"code": "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Session not found"})
            return
    
        document_id = session_obj.document_id
        collection_id = getattr(session_obj, "collection_id", None)
        is_collection_session = collection_id is not None and document_id is None
    
        doc = await db.get(Document, document_id) if document_id else None
    
        # For collection sessions, load document names
        collection_doc_names: dict[uuid.UUID, str] = {}
        if is_collection_session:
            from app.models.tables import collection_documents as cd_table
            cd_rows = await db.execute(
                select(cd_table.c.document_id).where(cd_table.c.collection_id == collection_id)
            )
            collection_doc_ids = [r[0] for r in cd_rows.all()]
            if collection_doc_ids:
                doc_rows = await db.execute(
                    select(Document.id, Document.filename).where(Document.id.in_(collection_doc_ids))
                )
                for drow in doc_rows.all():
                    collection_doc_names[drow[0]] = drow[1]
    
        # 2) Load assistant message to continue
        if message_id:
            asst_msg = await db.get(Message, message_id)
        else:
            # Fall back to most recent assistant message in session
            result = await db.execute(
                select(Message)
                .where(Message.session_id == session_id, Message.role == "assistant")
                .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())
                .limit(1)

            asst_msg = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    
        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":

        """Continue a truncated assistant response, appending to the existing message."""

        row = await db.execute(select(ChatSession).where(ChatSession.id == session_id))

        # 2) Load assistant message to continue
        if message_id:

        else:
            # Fall back to most recent assistant message in session
            result = await db.execute(
                select(Message)
                .where(Message.session_id == session_id, Message.role == "assistant")
                .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())

            return
    
        # 4) Resolve mode → model
        effective_mode = mode if mode in settings.MODE_MODELS else "balanced"

                    tables_by_id: dict[str, DocumentTable] = {}
                    if table_ids_set:
                        table_uuids = [uuid.UUID(tid) for tid in table_ids_set]
                        table_rows = await db.execute(
                            select(DocumentTable).where(DocumentTable.id.in_(table_uuids))
                        )
                        for table in table_rows.scalars():
                            tables_by_id[str(table.id)] = table
    
                    for ref_num, cid in ref_to_chunk_id.items():
                        ch = chunks_by_id.get(cid)
                        if ch:
                            citation = dict(ref_to_citation.get(ref_num) or {})
                            table_id = citation.get("table_id")
                            if table_id and not citation.get("table_context"):
                                table = tables_by_id.get(str(table_id))
                                if table:
                                    citation["table_context"] = table_evidence_text(table)
                                    citation["page"] = table.page
                                    citation["page_end"] = table.page
                            chunk_map[ref_num] = _chunk_info_from_persisted_citation(
                                ch,
                                citation,
                                collection_doc_names,
                            )
    
            # 7) Load conversation history
            max_turns = int(settings.MAX_CHAT_HISTORY_TURNS or 6)
            max_msgs = max_turns * 2
            msgs_row = await db.execute(
                select(Message)
                .where(Message.session_id == session_id)
                .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())
                .limit(max_msgs + 1)
            )
            history_msgs: List[Message] = list(msgs_row.scalars().all())
            history_msgs.reverse()
    
            claude_messages: List[dict] = []
            for m in history_msgs:
                claude_messages.append({"role": m.role, "content": m.content})
    
            # Add continuation prompt
            claude_messages.append({
                "role": "user",
                "content": _continuation_prompt(locale, asst_msg.content),
            })
    
            # 8) Build system prompt with chunk_map context
            numbered_chunks: List[str] = []
            for idx in sorted(chunk_map.keys()):
                info = chunk_map[idx]
                text = (info.text or "")[:1400]
                doc_label = ""
                if is_collection_session and info.document_id:
                    fname = collection_doc_names.get(info.document_id, "")
                    if fname:
                        doc_label = f"(from: {fname}) "
                numbered_chunks.append(f"[{idx}] {doc_label}{text}")
    
            rules = get_rules_for_model(
                effective_model, is_collection=is_collection_session
            )
    
            if is_collection_session:
                doc_list = ", ".join(collection_doc_names.values()) if collection_doc_names else "(no documents)"
                system_prompt = (
                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on fragments from multiple documents.\n\n"
                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
                    + f"## Available Documents\n{doc_list}\n\n"
                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
                    + _citation_contract()
                )
            else:
                system_prompt = (
                    "You are a document analysis assistant. Answer the user's question based on the following document fragments.\n\n"
                    + SYSTEM_PROMPT_META_RULE
                    + "## Document Fragments\n"
                    + ("\n".join(numbered_chunks) if numbered_chunks else "(none)")
                    + "\n\n## Rules\n" + rules
                    + _citation_contract()
                )
    
            if doc and doc.custom_instructions:
                system_prompt += (
                    "\n## Custom Instructions\n"
                    "The user has provided the following custom instructions for this document. Follow them:\n"
                    + doc.custom_instructions + "\n"
                )
    
            system_prompt += "\n" + _continuation_system_rule(locale, asst_msg.content)
        except Exception as e:
            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                try:
                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
                    settled = True
                except Exception:
                    logger.exception(
                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits during continuation setup failure for user %s",
                        user.id,
                    )
            yield _safe_sse("error", "CHAT_SETUP_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
            return
    
        # 9) Stream from LLM
        try:
            client = _get_llm_client(effective_model)
        except Exception as e:
            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                try:
                    await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
                    settled = True
                except Exception:
                    logger.exception(
                        "Failed to refund pre-debited credits before continuation LLM client setup for user %s",
                        user.id,
                    )
            yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
            return
        profile = get_model_profile(effective_model)
    
        if profile.supports_cache_control:
            sys_msg: dict = {
                "role": "system",
                "content": [{"type": "text", "text": system_prompt, "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}}],
            }
        else:
            sys_msg = {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}
        openai_messages = [sys_msg] + claude_messages
    
        continuation_text_parts: List[str] = []
        new_citations: List[dict] = []
        fsm = RefParserFSM(chunk_map)
        fsm.char_offset = len(asst_msg.content)  # Offset citations relative to full text
    
        last_ping = time.monotonic()
        prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None
        output_tokens: Optional[int] = None
        finish_reason: Optional[str] = None
        repair_metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None
        persisted = False
        done_emitted = False
        base_assistant_text = asst_msg.content or ""
        base_output_tokens = int(asst_msg.output_tokens or 0)
    
        try:
            try:
                create_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
                    "model": effective_model,
                    "max_tokens": profile.max_tokens,
                    "temperature": profile.temperature,
                    "messages": openai_messages,
                    "stream": True,
                }
                if profile.supports_stream_options:
                    create_kwargs["stream_options"] = {"include_usage": True}
                _apply_provider_options(create_kwargs, effective_model)
                stream = await client.chat.completions.create(**create_kwargs)
    
                async for chunk in stream:
                    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].delta.content:
                        text = chunk.choices[0].delta.content
                        for ev in fsm.feed(text):
                            if ev["event"] == "token":
                                continuation_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
                            elif ev["event"] == "citation":
                                new_citations.append(ev["data"])
                            yield ev
    
                    if chunk.choices and chunk.choices[0].finish_reason:
                        finish_reason = chunk.choices[0].finish_reason
    
                    if hasattr(chunk, "usage") and chunk.usage:
                        prompt_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "prompt_tokens", None)
                        output_tokens = getattr(chunk.usage, "completion_tokens", None)
    
                    now = time.monotonic()
                    if now - last_ping >= 15.0:
                        yield sse("ping", {})
                        last_ping = now
    
                for ev in fsm.flush():
                    if ev["event"] == "token":
                        continuation_text_parts.append(ev["data"]["text"])
                    yield ev
    
                if not new_citations:
                    continuation_snapshot = "".join(continuation_text_parts)
                    fallback_citations = _fallback_citations(
                        continuation_snapshot,
                        chunk_map,
                        base_offset=len(base_assistant_text),
                    )
                    if fallback_citations:
                        logger.warning(
                            "LLM emitted no continuation citation markers; generated %d fallback citations model=%s",
                            len(fallback_citations),
                            effective_model,
                        )
                        for citation in fallback_citations:
                            new_citations.append(citation)
                            yield sse("citation", citation)
    
                if finish_reason == "length":
                    yield sse("truncated", {"reason": "max_tokens"})
    
            except Exception as e:
                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                    try:
                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
                        settled = True
                    except Exception:
                        logger.exception(
                            "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after continuation LLM error for user %s",
                            user.id,
                        )
                yield _safe_sse("error", "LLM_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
                return
    
            # 10) Persist continuation draft before verification/repair (A2)
            continuation_text = "".join(continuation_text_parts)
            full_assistant_text = base_assistant_text + continuation_text
            merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + new_citations
            try:
                asst_msg.content = full_assistant_text
                asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
                asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
                asst_msg.output_tokens = base_output_tokens + int(output_tokens or 0)
                await db.commit()
                persisted = True
            except Exception:
                await db.rollback()
                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                    try:
                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
                        settled = True
                    except Exception:
                        logger.exception(
                            "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after continuation PERSIST_FAILED for user %s",
                            user.id,
                        )
                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save continuation"})
                return
    
            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
                full_assistant_text,
                merged_citations,
                set(chunk_map.keys()),
                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
            )
            verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
            if verification_report.status != "pass" and finish_reason != "length":
                yield sse("tool_status", {"message": "Checking citation support..."})
                repair = await _try_repair_rag_answer(
                    client=client,
                    model=effective_model,
                    profile=profile,
                    user_message=_continuation_prompt(locale, base_assistant_text),
                    assistant_text=full_assistant_text,
                    citations=merged_citations,
                    chunk_map=chunk_map,
                    numbered_chunks=numbered_chunks,
                    verification=verification_payload,
                    locale=locale,
                )
                if repair is not None:
                    repair_metadata = repair.metadata
                    if repair.prompt_tokens:
                        prompt_tokens = int(prompt_tokens or 0) + repair.prompt_tokens
                    if repair.output_tokens:
                        output_tokens = int(output_tokens or 0) + repair.output_tokens
                    if repair.applied:
                        full_assistant_text = repair.text
                        merged_citations = repair.citations
                        verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(
                            full_assistant_text,
                            merged_citations,
                            set(chunk_map.keys()),
                            retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
                        )
                        verification_payload = verification_report.to_payload()
                        yield sse(
                            "answer_repaired",
                            {
                                "text": full_assistant_text,
                                "citations": merged_citations,
                                "verification": verification_payload,
                            },
                        )
            if verification_report.status != "pass":
                logger.warning(
                    "RAG continuation verification status=%s score=%.3f claims=%d citations=%d reasons=%s",
                    verification_report.status,
                    verification_report.score,
                    verification_report.claim_count,
                    verification_report.citation_count,
                    ",".join(verification_report.reasons),
                )
    
            try:
                asst_msg.content = full_assistant_text
                asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
                asst_msg.output_tokens = base_output_tokens + int(output_tokens or 0)
                await db.commit()
            except Exception:
                await db.rollback()
                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save continuation"})
                return
    
            await _record_rag_verification_event(
                db,
                user=user,
                message_id=getattr(asst_msg, "id", None),
                verification=verification_payload,
                retrieval_strategy="continuation",
                query_route=None,
                retrieved_count=len(chunk_map),
                repair_metadata=repair_metadata,
            )
    
            # Credits: reconcile
            if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
                pt = int(prompt_tokens or 0)
                ct = int(output_tokens or 0)
                try:
                    actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(pt, ct, effective_model, mode=effective_mode)
                    await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
                        db, user.id, predebit_ledger_id, pre_debited, actual_cost,
                    )
                    await credit_service.record_usage(
                        db,
                        user_id=user.id,
                        message_id=asst_msg.id,
                        model=effective_model,
                        prompt_tokens=pt,
                        completion_tokens=ct,
                        cost_credits=actual_cost,
                    )
                    await db.commit()
                    settled = True
                except Exception as e:
                    yield _safe_sse("warn", "ACCOUNTING_ERROR", e, session_id=str(session_id))
    
            # 11) done
            can_continue = asst_msg.continuation_count < settings.MAX_CONTINUATIONS_PER_MESSAGE
            done_emitted = True
            yield sse("done", {
                "message_id": str(asst_msg.id),
                "citations_count": len(merged_citations) if merged_citations else 0,
                "verification": verification_payload,
                "repair": repair_metadata,
                "can_continue": can_continue and finish_reason == "length",
                "continuation_count": asst_msg.continuation_count,
            })
        except asyncio.CancelledError:
            raise
        finally:
            if not done_emitted:
                continuation_snapshot = "".join(continuation_text_parts)
                has_partial_answer = bool(continuation_snapshot.strip())
                if has_partial_answer and not persisted and getattr(asst_msg, "id", None) is not None:
                    try:
                        with anyio.CancelScope(shield=True):
                            await _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
                                message_id=asst_msg.id,
                                continuation_text=continuation_snapshot,
                                new_citations=new_citations,
                                output_tokens=output_tokens,
                            )
                        persisted = True
                    except Exception:
                        logger.exception(
                            "Failed to persist continuation partial response on cancel/error for message %s",
                            getattr(asst_msg, "id", None),
                        )
                if (
                    user is not None
                    and pre_debited > 0
                    and predebit_ledger_id is not None
>                   and not settled
                ):

             total += int(verification.get(key) or 0)

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,

     await db.commit()
 
 
+async def _persist_partial_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    session_id: uuid.UUID,
+    assistant_text: str,
+    citations: Optional[List[dict]] = None,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+    output_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
+) -> Optional[uuid.UUID]:
+    text = assistant_text.strip()
+    if not text:
+        return None
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = Message(
+            session_id=session_id,
+            role="assistant",
+            content=text,
+            citations=citations or None,
+            prompt_tokens=int(prompt_tokens) if prompt_tokens is not None else None,
+            output_tokens=int(output_tokens) if output_tokens is not None else None,
+        )
+        persist_db.add(asst_msg)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return asst_msg.id
+
+
+async def _persist_continuation_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    message_id: uuid.UUID,
+    continuation_text: str,
+    new_citations: List[dict],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+) -> bool:
+    if not continuation_text.strip():
+        return False
+
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as persist_db:
+        asst_msg = await persist_db.get(Message, message_id)
+        if not asst_msg or asst_msg.role != "assistant":
+            return False
+
+        merged_citations = list(asst_msg.citations or []) + list(new_citations or [])
+        asst_msg.content = (asst_msg.content or "") + continuation_text
+        asst_msg.citations = merged_citations if merged_citations else None
+        asst_msg.continuation_count = (asst_msg.continuation_count or 0) + 1
+        asst_msg.output_tokens = (asst_msg.output_tokens or 0) + int(output_tokens or 0)
+        await persist_db.commit()
+        return True
+
+
+async def _settle_predebit_on_cancel(
+    *,
+    user_id: uuid.UUID,
+    pre_debited: int,
+    predebit_ledger_id: uuid.UUID,
+    has_answer: bool,
+    prompt_tokens: Optional[int],
+    output_tokens: Optional[int],
+    model: str,
+    mode: str,
+) -> None:
+    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as settle_db:
+        if has_answer:
+            actual_cost = credit_service.calculate_cost(
+                int(prompt_tokens or 0),
+                int(output_tokens or 0),
+                model,
+                mode=mode,
+            )
+            await credit_service.reconcile_credits(
+                settle_db,
+                user_id,
+                predebit_ledger_id,
+                pre_debited,
+                actual_cost,
+            )
+            await settle_db.commit()
+        else:
+            await _refund_predebit(settle_db, user_id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+
+
 async def _record_rag_verification_event(
     db: AsyncSession,
     *,
@@ -930,6 +1015,7 @@

                 return

+            except Exception as e:
+                # Refund pre-debited credits on LLM failure: restore balance and remove ledger entry
+                if user is not None and pre_debited > 0 and predebit_ledger_id is not None:
+                    try:
+                        await _refund_predebit(db, user.id, pre_debited, predebit_ledger_id)
+                        settled = True
+                    except Exception:
+                        logger.exception(
+                            "Failed to refund pre-debited credits after LLM error for user %s",

+                persisted = True

+                await db.rollback()

+                yield sse("error", {"code": "PERSIST_FAILED", "message": "Failed to save response"})
+                return
+
+            verification_report = claim_verifier_service.verify(

+                set(chunk_map.keys()),

+                    if repair.output_tokens:
+                        output_tokens = int(output_tokens or 0) + repair.output_tokens

+                    verification_report.claim_count,
